tasks.completion_summary: Implemented JobObjectWatchdog (Windows Job Object with KILL_ON_JOB_CLOSE + parent-PID poller via NtQueryInformationProcess). Wired in Program.cs entry + -c path. Added stdin-EOF fast-path. Bundled fix for dSIX4qP7DtFG (-c --oneline short-option parity) via InteractiveShell.ExpandAliases. Extended scripts/test.sh cleanup to kill dotnet test driver + ps-bash + worker, trap SIGINT. 3 ProcessLifecycleTests + 5 regression tests all pass.
